ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: NOT(ISPICKVAL(Customer__r.Sales_Region__c, 'USA') || ISPICKVAL(Customer__r.Sales_Region__c, 'USA(OEM)') || ISPICKVAL(Customer__r.Sales_Region__c, 'Hisense Mexico') || ISPICKVAL(Customer__r.Sales_Region__c, 'Hisense Australia') || ISPICKVAL(Customer__r.Sales_Region__c, 'Hisense Malaysia') || ISPICKVAL(Customer__r.Sales_Region__c, 'Hisense SA Sales Holdings') ) && ISBLANK( Minimum_Gross_Profit_Margin_Level__c )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please input Minimum Gross Profit Margin-Level
